description_long: This house is a two-story Mediterranean-style residence surrounded by dense, mature trees and lush landscaping. The exterior features a mix of white stucco walls and terracotta roof tiles, with large windows and multiple balconies providing ample natural light. The front yard includes a spacious paved patio, a garden with colorful flowers, and a prominent palm tree, creating a welcoming atmosphere. The house has a garage with a brown door, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with decorative columns and an overhanging roof. The rear and side views reveal additional balconies and a variety of window shapes, contributing to an asymmetrical yet harmonious facade. The overall setting suggests a private, upscale suburban home with a strong emphasis on outdoor living and greenery.
description: A Mediterranean-style two-story house with white stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, large windows, balconies, and lush landscaping, including a paved patio and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved patio, garden, palm tree, and garage with brown door.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the dense tree coverage, side balconies, and a more private aspect of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible balconies, asymmetrical window placement, and extensive tree coverage obscuring much of the facade.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the garage, additional entry points, and a blend of greenery and paved areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows, some grouped and some standalone, including balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, decorative columns, overhanging roof, and a prominent front door adjacent to a paved patio
